name: 2026-06-02 Political Commentary Senate Corruption Shield TH
description:
Day 2: still no Senate quorum.

On camera, the reason is 'Senate independence.'

In print, the reason is keeping the grip on the Blue Ribbon Committee. The same committee investigating P180 billion in flood control kickbacks.

Walang quorum, walang batas.

That is not independence. That is a corruption shield.

On camera, the reason is 'Senate independence.'

Senate plenary Day 2 (2026-06-02 PHT): majority bloc snubs plenary for second straight day after sitting senator arrested on Sandiganbayan plunder warrant (flood-control scandal). 11 minority senators present, quorum required 13. Reported motive: keep grip on Blue Ribbon Committee investigating ~P180B in flood-control kickbacks across 673 ghost projects. Sources: Rappler, Manila Bulletin, Sunstar, Philstar, Gulf News.
